title: Budget Consumption Event v1
description: Telemetry schema for logging per-turn explicitness budget consumption in Horror$Place sessions. Enables correlation between budget usage, invariant caps, and entertainment metrics without storing PII or raw content.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this budget consumption event.

session_id.description: Opaque session UUID; non-reversible and non-linkable across sessions without external mapping.

user_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of user identifier with salt; pseudonymous, non-reversible.

turn_index.description: Zero-based index of the turn within the session.

consent_tier.description: Effective consent state for this turn, from consent-state-machine-v1.json.

policy_tier.description: Policy envelope tier governing content rules for this turn.

region_id.description: Optional region identifier where the content was generated.

selector_pattern_id.description: Optional reference to the narrative pattern selected by the History-Aware Content Selector.

template_id.description: Optional reference to the AI-Chat template used for this turn.

budget_total.description: Total explicitness budget allocated for this session at this turn.

budget_remaining.description: Remaining budget after this turn's consumption.

over_budget.description: True if budget_remaining < 0 (should trigger over-budget behavior).

budget_band.description: Current budget consumption band from horror-intensity-budget-policy-v1.json.

budget_state.description: Snapshot of the explicitness budget state after this turn.

total_delta.description: Total explicitness consumed this turn (0-1 scale).

by_modality.description: Breakdown of consumption by content modality.

classifier_confidence.description: Classifier confidence scores that informed the consumption calculation.

consumption_deltas.description: Explicitness consumed during this turn, with modality breakdown.

invariant_snapshot.description: Snapshot of geo-historical invariants at the time of content generation.

metrics_snapshot.description: Entertainment metrics values at the time of this turn (may be post-hoc estimates).

boundary_decision.description: Final decision from Content Boundary & Policy Engine for this turn.

redaction_applied.description: True if any redaction tokens were applied to the output.

over_budget_behavior.description: Details of over-budget behavior if triggered this turn.

context.description: Optional opaque context tag (no PII or raw content).

distress_signal.description: Optional distress indicator logged for this turn.

deadledger_ref.description: Optional reference to a Dead-Ledger proof envelope for governance-auditable high-intensity turns.

delta.description: Amount of explicitness consumed for this modality this turn.

capped.description: True if this modality hit its per-tier cap this turn.

weight_applied.description: Optional consumption weight multiplier applied (from horror-intensity-budget-policy-v1.json).

invariantValue.description: Normalized invariant value (0-1 scale) as defined in Horror.Place invariants_v1.json.

invariantValueDET.description: DET invariant value (0-10 scale) as defined in Horror.Place invariants_v1.json.

metricValue.description: Entertainment metric value (0-1 scale) as defined in Horror.Place entertainment_metrics_v1.json.
